failure_mode_ranking.description: Signal withheld because regime duration below minimum threshold
Signal inverted or excluded due to weak symbol diagnosis
Signal withheld because confidence below minimum threshold

chi_squared_independence.test_description: Chi-squared test of independence: gate failures vs symbol

limitations.description: Routing gates are replayed from published policy defaults, not from the actual gate decisions made at signal emission time. If the producer changed policy mid-stream, traces may not match historical routing.
limitations.magnitude: Unknown — depends on policy drift between emission and trace

limitations.description: Aggregation stage assumes single-producer system. Multi-producer consumers would have different aggregation weights and consensus outcomes.
limitations.magnitude: No bias — single-producer is accurate for current b1e55ed deployment

limitations.description: Proof inclusion uses current timestamp for window membership. Signals near window boundaries may be classified differently than they were at proof snapshot time.
limitations.magnitude: Affects only boundary signals; all signals >30d old drop from 7d/14d/30d windows

limitations.description: 0 of 100 signals (0.0%) lack resolution data. These signals get SKIP verdicts at resolution, proof, and trust stages. Aggregate failure rates are computed on the full set, not just resolved signals.
limitations.magnitude: 0.0% of signals excluded from resolution-dependent analysis

limitations.description: VOI gate uses historical per-symbol accuracy as a static estimate. In practice, VOI should be computed from the current regime-duration cell, which varies over time.
limitations.magnitude: VOI gate is disabled by default; only relevant if consumer enables it

limitations.description: Chi-squared test assumes cell counts are independent observations. Sequential signals from the same producer in the same regime may be autocorrelated, inflating the test statistic.
limitations.magnitude: Could inflate chi-squared by ~10-30% for highly correlated signal streams
